process.title: How it works
process.sub: Three steps. No surprises, no radio silence.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Discovery call — 30 min
steps.desc: We define your business objective, constraints, and what the page needs to deliver. No written brief required.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Proposal & wireframe in 48h
steps.desc: You receive an annotated page structure and clear pricing. You approve, we start.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Delivery + launch
steps.desc: Development, feedback integrated, launch. You get clean, documented code ready to evolve.

projects.title: Recent projects
projects.labTeaserText: Outside of client work, I build tools for real needs — sometimes mine, sometimes ones I couldn't find elsewhere.

items.title: Chanel Coco Crush — gamified jewelry experience
items.role: Development of a gamified mobile experience: jewelry profile quiz, Tinder-style swipe to build a wish list, generation of a personal QR code used at a physical Chanel event
items.result: Complete phygital experience delivered for a pop-up event — from product diagnosis to a scannable wish list in-store

items.title: Chanel Chance — interactive multi-view campaign
items.role: Development of a multi-view campaign landing page with promotional videos, and a diagnostic quiz helping visitors identify the Chance fragrance matching their profile
items.result: Personalized product discovery experience: each visitor lands on a result page dedicated to their fragrance, increasing relevance and purchase intent

items.title: Chanel Allure Sport — campaign & product funnel
items.role: Development of a campaign landing page with promotional videos, GSAP animations, and product list with add-to-cart
items.result: Immersive campaign connected to the Chanel e-commerce funnel — from product discovery to purchase in a single page

items.title: Chanel Look This Way — editorial experience
items.role: Development of an immersive editorial experience for the Look This Way campaign, desktop and mobile
items.result: Engaging visual experience delivered on time, consistent with the campaign identity

items.title: Chanel Sublimage — luxury skincare campaign
items.role: Development of the Sublimage campaign landing page with presentation animations and high-end asset integration
items.result: Premium rendering aligned with the luxury positioning of the Chanel skincare range

items.title: Chanel Manufacture — editorial page
items.role: Development of an editorial page dedicated to the craftsmanship of the Chanel Manufacture
items.result: Showcase of Chanel's artisan crafts, refined rendering, and successful mobile adaptation

items.title: Chanel N°5 — campaign landing page
items.role: Development of the N°5 campaign landing page with promotional videos, CSS/JS animations, and brand asset integration
items.result: Premium rendering consistent with the iconic fragrance identity, within Chanel technical constraints

items.title: Chanel CSR — commitments page
items.role: Development of the Chanel CSR page, editorial content structuring, and integration of institutional visuals
items.result: Clear and accessible institutional page, consistent with Chanel communication standards

items.title: Chanel 31 Le Rouge — makeup campaign
items.role: Development of the 31 Le Rouge campaign landing page, CSS/JS animations, and desktop/mobile consistency
items.result: Campaign page delivered within brand constraints, flawless visual rendering

otherMissions.title: Contributions
otherMissions.subtitle: Team contributions to high-traffic existing sites

items.name: Fnac Darty
items.description: Front-end development within the Darty Commerciality team — redesign of the product page, product list, and push pages. Design of cross-sell highlight components: insurance, warranties, associated services. Brand page integration.

items.name: Prisma Media
items.description: Front-end development within the Women's division (femmeactuelle.fr, cuisineactuelle.fr) — redesign of Home, Article, Author, and Recipe Book pages. Development of custom web components: review and star rating module on recipe pages, authentication module. Internal Chrome extension for GitLab code review management via Google Chat webhooks.

items.name: Yves Rocher
items.description: Campaign landing pages for the Lifting Végétal and Fragrance lines. Development of a diagnostic quiz to guide visitors toward the foundation matching their profile. E-commerce redesign, integration of Target2Sell product recommendation, and creation of A/B tests via ABTASTY.

about.title: About
about.bio:
I've been a front-end developer for 10 years, specializing in React and TypeScript. I've worked in demanding environments — Chanel, Fnac Darty, Prisma — where perceived quality and performance are non-negotiable.

Today I work freelance with startups and product teams that want to go beyond the static page: interactive experiences, AI integrations, premium digital campaigns. I don't wait for a perfect Jira ticket to start: a two-paragraph brief is enough.

I work remotely, in fast-paced mode, with an AI workflow that lets me deliver quickly without sacrificing quality.

testimonials.title: They trusted me
testimonials.sub: Marketing, e-commerce and media teams I've worked with.

items.quote: He handled projects end to end, in a demanding environment with strict pixel-perfect and performance constraints. Deliveries were always on time, with a consistently high level of quality.
items.name: Marine Benoit-Jannin

items.quote: Adrien has a keen eye for detail and is committed to delivering quality work. He is also very communicative and a great team player, making him a valuable asset on any project.
items.name: Quentin Vuong

items.quote: It is rare to find a developer who is flexible, always attentive, and truly understands business challenges. He brought calm and clarity to complex projects.
items.name: Aurélia Baudelaire

lab.title: Lab
lab.sub: Personal projects — tools, experiments, stuff built for a real need or just to see.

items.title: FitnessPal
items.description: Complete workout tracking app, built with AI-assisted live coding. PPL/Cardio 4-day program, exercise cards with muscle illustrations, weight tracking, session history by calendar, light/dark theme, Google authentication. A concrete example of what an AI workflow can deliver quickly without sacrificing quality.

items.title: Dripflow
items.description: Automated Instagram content pipeline powered by AI. Upload a reference image → Claude Sonnet generates optimized Midjourney prompts → human approval workflow → image generation via fal.ai → visual selection → caption generation in 3 tones (mysterious, casual, artistic) → carousel assembly → automatic publication on Instagram via the Instagram Graph API (Meta). Designed to manage a virtual influencer account.
